problem id: aa625771
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHL(1)

examples:
  11000111 -> 11111110
  11000011 -> 11111110
  10101001 -> 01110111
  11101001 -> 11111111
  00010011 -> 01100110
  00001111 -> 11111111
  00111111 -> 11111111
  01010101 -> 10101010
  10001111 -> 11111111

query: 01011010
predicted answer: 11111111
